blended.narrative: Blacktail Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 14.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 37".
